title: Deeper Teams Integration
excerpt: I would like to see a more robust features and automation options with the Teams integration. A chief request for me is to allow notifications to be directed to Teams Group Chats and not only Teams Channels.

posts.author: Franz (Franz Thiessen)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to see a more robust features and automation options with the Teams integration. A chief request for me is to allow notifications to be directed to Teams Group Chats and not only Teams Channels.

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Franz!

I totally get where you’re coming from. Enhancing the Teams integration with more robust features would be a game-changer.

Expanding the automation options to include notifications for Teams Group Chats is crucial. It would allow for more precise communication, ensuring that the right people are alerted, even in smaller or more specialized groups.
Additionally, customizing how notifications are triggered based on specific conditions in Monday.com could significantly streamline workflows.

posts.author: CityKidz (Richard Brooks)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree. Please, dear Monday devs, make the Teams integration at least as good as the Slack integration. Right now it’s one-way only. Include the ability to message a user from “Email and Activities”, or from an automation. And let a Teams user be able to message to a specific update/pulse in Teams. Otherwise, your ServiceDesk template is a big waste of time.

posts.author: msetter (marcy setter)
posts.cookedHtml: 100% this would be a game changer. After installing the Teams integration I was shocked I couldn’t notify an individual in teams. That it was driven on “teams” and we don’t use the team functionality. I have a task board that has groups such as Vendor asks, Team Asks (as in my directs), project asks, etc. When I assign a task to Joe, I want it to ping Joe only in teams to notify him.

posts.author: ChristineWLF (Christine)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree I would love automation for all notifications to go to teams too
